rationale: The Iran-US deal momentum offers the most tangible new development for Romania via potential energy price relief; regional security situation unchanged.

top_events.title: Iran signals Hormuz reopening tied to peace deal; UAE unlocks frozen funds
top_events.summary: Progress toward a US-Iran deal could ease energy costs for Romania, which remains exposed to global gas price volatility and is still diversifying away from Russian supply.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war / Black Sea security — no new escalation
top_events.summary: War near Romania's border continues without qualitative change; Black Sea security situation holds at elevated but stable background level.

top_events.title: EU formally launches accession process for Ukraine and Moldova
top_events.summary: Accession talks proceed without new steps this cycle; long-term stability for Romania's eastern neighborhood remains a positive but slow-moving factor.
